title: Accessible Error Summary

statement.markdown:
## Build an Accessible Error Summary

### Requirements
1. The error summary should have a clear heading that indicates the type of error (e.g., 'Validation Errors', 'System Errors', etc).
2. Each error must have a specific description, which should be visible to the user.
3. The error summary should be accessible and usable by screen readers.
4. The error summary should be displayed only when there are errors to display.

constraints: The entire application should be styled using Tailwind CSS.
The error summary should be displayed using a dialog box.

starterCode.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Error Summary</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
</head>
<body>

    <!-- The error summary will be displayed here -->

    <!-- Import the JavaScript file that will handle the error summary -->
    <script src="error-summary.js"></script>
</body>
</html>

gradingCriteria.description: Error summary is displayed with a clear heading.
Each error has a specific description visible to the user.
Error summary is accessible and usable by screen readers.
Error summary is displayed only when there are errors to display.
